moments.title: FIFA World Cup Group Stage Continues
moments.blurb: The FIFA World Cup 2026 group stage delivers more exciting matches today, featuring major teams battling it out for a spot in the next round.

angles.name: Evening Football
angles.copy: Another huge day at the World Cup! Who are you backing tonight as Belgium face Egypt and Saudi Arabia take on Uruguay? Live on BBC One and ITV1.

angles.name: Lunchtime Kick-off
angles.copy: Get your World Cup fix early today! Spain kick off against Cape Verde this afternoon. Perfect for a long lunch break. Tune in on ITV1!

moments.title: ICC Women's T20 World Cup Underway
moments.blurb: The ICC Women's T20 World Cup 2026 is currently being hosted in England, with matches taking place across the country until mid-July.

angles.name: Home Soil Action
angles.copy: The ICC Women's T20 World Cup is on NOW, right here in England! Are you following the action as the best teams battle for glory?

angles.name: Women's Cricket Buzz
angles.copy: Who's making headlines at the Women's T20 World Cup? The tournament is in full swing on home soil, bringing world-class cricket to the UK!

moments.title: England Men vs New Zealand 2nd Test
moments.blurb: England's men's cricket team will face New Zealand in the second Test match of their series at The Kia Oval in London, starting Wednesday.

angles.name: Test Match Build-up
angles.copy: Get ready for some red-ball cricket! England take on New Zealand in the 2nd Test at The Kia Oval from Wednesday. Who's heading down?

angles.name: London Cricket
angles.copy: Huge week for cricket fans in the capital! England vs New Zealand at The Kia Oval starts Wednesday. Expecting big crowds and even bigger shots!

moments.title: Live Tennis from Queen's Club
moments.blurb: The ATP & WTA Queen's Club Championships are live today on BBC Two, featuring top tennis talent in London.

angles.name: Grass Court Action
angles.copy: It's grass court season! Live tennis from Queen's Club is on BBC Two this afternoon. Who's your pick for the title?

angles.name: London Tennis
angles.copy: Serving up some live tennis from Queen's Club today! Catch all the action from one of London's most iconic tournaments on BBC Two.

moments.title: F1 Austrian Grand Prix
moments.blurb: Following a thrilling Spanish Grand Prix, Formula 1 heads to Austria next weekend for Round 8 of the 2026 season.

angles.name: F1 Countdown
angles.copy: Just finished the Spanish GP, and already looking ahead! F1 races to Austria next weekend. Who's excited for the Red Bull Ring?

angles.name: Next Race Alert
angles.copy: The F1 circus never stops! The Austrian Grand Prix is coming up fast. Get ready for more high-speed drama!

moments.title: Premier League 2026/27 Fixtures Release
moments.blurb: The full fixture list for the 2026/27 Premier League season will be released this Friday, giving fans their first look at the new campaign.

angles.name: Fixture Release Day
angles.copy: Mark your calendars! The 2026/27 Premier League fixtures drop this Friday. Who are you hoping your team plays first?

angles.name: Planning for the Season
angles.copy: The wait is almost over! Premier League fixtures are out Friday. Time to start planning those away days and big match weekends!

moments.title: Official UK Singles Chart Updates
moments.blurb: The Official UK Singles Chart for the week ending June 18, 2026, features Taylor Swift's 'I Knew It, I Knew You' at Number 1, with new entries and climbers.

angles.name: Chart Topper
angles.copy: Taylor Swift is still dominating the UK Singles Chart with 'I Knew It, I Knew You' at Number 1! What's your favourite from the Top 40 this week?

angles.name: New Music & Climbers
angles.copy: Beyond Taylor Swift at the top, who else is making waves in the UK Singles Chart? Shout out your favourite new entries and climbers!

moments.title: 24 Hours in A&E Returns
moments.blurb: The compelling documentary series '24 Hours in A&E' begins a new season tonight on Channel 4, offering an intimate look at life in a busy emergency department.

angles.name: New Series Alert
angles.copy: It's back! '24 Hours in A&E' returns for a brand new series tonight at 9pm on Channel 4. Prepare for more gripping stories from the frontline.

angles.name: Must-Watch TV
angles.copy: If you need a dose of real-life drama, '24 Hours in A&E' is essential viewing tonight. New series, 9pm, Channel 4. Who's watching?

moments.title: New Drama 'Little Disasters' Premieres
moments.blurb: A new series, 'Little Disasters', premieres tonight on Channel 5 at 9pm, exploring the complexities of friendship and motherhood.

angles.name: New Drama Tonight
angles.copy: Looking for a new drama? 'Little Disasters' starts tonight at 9pm on Channel 5. Expect a compelling story of friendship, secrets, and motherhood.

angles.name: Channel 5 Premiere
angles.copy: Don't miss the premiere of 'Little Disasters' tonight on Channel 5 at 9pm. A new series diving into the lives of four friends.

moments.title: 'Funboys' Series Two Debuts
moments.blurb: The second series of the comedy 'Funboys' starts today on BBC Three, featuring returning cast members and new addition Steve Coogan.

angles.name: Comedy Returns
angles.copy: Good news, comedy fans! 'Funboys' is back for Series Two on BBC Three today, with Steve Coogan joining the cast. Get ready to laugh!

angles.name: Steve Coogan
angles.copy: Steve Coogan joins the cast for Series Two of 'Funboys', starting today on BBC Three. Tune in for some new comedy gold!

moments.title: Summer Solstice Approaches
moments.blurb: The Summer Solstice, marking the longest day and shortest night of the year in the Northern Hemisphere, occurs this Sunday, June 21st, at 9:24 AM BST.

angles.name: Longest Day
angles.copy: The Summer Solstice is this Sunday! Get ready for the longest day of the year and make the most of that extra daylight. How will you celebrate?

angles.name: Midsummer Magic
angles.copy: Midsummer is almost here! Sunday marks the Summer Solstice, a perfect excuse to soak up the sun and enjoy the start of astronomical summer.

moments.title: Happy 77th Birthday Lionel Richie
moments.blurb: Legendary singer-songwriter Lionel Richie, known for hits like 'Hello' and 'All Night Long', celebrates his 77th birthday this Saturday, June 20th.

angles.name: Lionel Richie Bday
angles.copy: Happy 77th Birthday to the one and only Lionel Richie this Saturday! What's your favourite Lionel track?

angles.name: Music Legend
angles.copy: Can you believe Lionel Richie turns 77 this weekend? Get ready for a playlist of his greatest hits to celebrate!

moments.title: Happy 84th Birthday Brian Wilson
moments.blurb: The iconic co-founder of The Beach Boys, Brian Wilson, celebrates his 84th birthday this Saturday, June 20th.

angles.name: Brian Wilson Bday
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 84th Birthday to the legendary Brian Wilson of The Beach Boys this Saturday! What's your favourite Beach Boys song?

angles.name: Beach Boys Icon
angles.copy: From 'Good Vibrations' to 'God Only Knows', Brian Wilson's genius is undeniable. Celebrate his 84th birthday this weekend!

moments.title: Happy 41st Birthday Lana Del Rey
moments.blurb: Acclaimed singer-songwriter Lana Del Rey, known for her distinctive style and melancholic sound, turns 41 this Sunday, June 21st.

angles.name: Lana Del Rey Bday
angles.copy: Happy 41st Birthday to the incredible Lana Del Rey this Sunday! What's your go-to Lana track?

angles.name: Queen of Melancholy
angles.copy: Celebrating the unique artistry of Lana Del Rey, who turns 41 on Sunday. Which of her albums is your favourite?

moments.title: Happy 73rd Birthday Cyndi Lauper
moments.blurb: Pop icon Cyndi Lauper, famous for her vibrant style and hits like 'Girls Just Want To Have Fun', celebrates her 73rd birthday next Monday, June 22nd.

angles.name: Cyndi Lauper Bday
angles.copy: Next Monday, Cyndi Lauper turns 73! Get ready to celebrate a true 80s icon. What's your favourite Cyndi hit?

angles.name: Girls Just Wanna Have Fun
angles.copy: Still living for her unique style and incredible voice! Cyndi Lauper celebrates her 73rd birthday on Monday. Let's blast her greatest hits!

moments.title: Happy 65th Birthday Jimmy Somerville
moments.blurb: Singer Jimmy Somerville, known for his work with Bronski Beat and The Communards, celebrates his 65th birthday next Monday, June 22nd.

angles.name: Jimmy Somerville Bday
angles.copy: Smalltown Boy, Big voice! Jimmy Somerville turns 65 next Monday. Which of his hits gets you on the dance floor?

angles.name: 80s Dance Icon
angles.copy: From Bronski Beat to The Communards, Jimmy Somerville brought us some incredible 80s dance anthems. Happy 65th for Monday!
